open_issues.sg32a2_R32_STILL_OPEN: #38282 execcommandwithoutcontext enforce-readiness: 2 genuine violations mcp_inspect_mcp.go:150,155 connectStdioMCPServer + add internal/nolint + enforce. Blocked on sg32a1. NOT landed after 1 day. DO NOT REFILE; reverify.
open_issues.sg33a1_R33: ctxbackground precision: isContextBackgroundCall (ctxbackground.go:86) matches `ident.Name=='context'` SYNTACTICALLY (no pass.TypesInfo). KILLER ARG: same file detects the ctx PARAM by TYPE IDENTITY (types.Identical at :103, contextType scans imports path 'context' at :118-128) -> call detection is internally inconsistent. Fix = sg31a2 sortslice template (ObjectOf->*types.PkgName->Imported().Path()=='context') / existing astutil.IsFmtErrorf. Single-file+testdata. Created this run, label sergo.

patterns.syntactic_stdlib_match: NEW R33 (generalizes sg31a2 sortslice). Many linters detect stdlib calls by `ident.Name=='<pkg>'` with NO pass.TypesInfo package-identity check -> latent FP (shadow/field named after pkg) AND FN (aliased import evades). Grep `\.Name == "(context|sort|strings|fmt|os|exec|...)"` across pkg/linters finds them in ONE call. R33 hits: errstringmatch:85 rawloginlib:62 fprintlnsprintf:144 regexpcompileinfunction:81 osexitinlibrary:59 ctxbackground:86. Correct pattern (landed sg31a2 / astutil.IsFmtErrorf): ObjectOf->*types.PkgName->Imported().Path(). STRONGEST sub-signal: a linter that uses type-identity for ONE thing but syntactic for another (ctxbackground param vs call) = internal inconsistency = high land probability.
patterns.precision_fix_lands: REVISED R33: single-file SIMPLE precision fixes land ~1day (sg24a1 R25, sg27a1 R28, sg28a1 R29, sg29a1+a2 R30, sg30a1+a2 R31, sg31a1+a2 R32). BUT sg32a1 #38281 (nilguard control-flow FP) + sg32a2 #38282 (enforce-readiness, blocked) STILL OPEN after 1 day -> COMPLEX control-flow/multi-step fixes are SLOWER. Prefer single-file syntactic->type-identity swaps (proven fast) over control-flow-aware fixes.
patterns.new_linter_doc_lag: WATCH but NO LONGER AUTOMATIC (broke R32: 24th landed fully documented). Still diff main.go count vs doc.go 'All N' vs spec_test documentedAnalyzers() len each run; expect gap=0. R33: still 24, gap 0.
patterns.new_linter_precision_audit: Each new linter: type-identity vs syntactic name; THEN control-flow precision (nilguards/else/dual-path -> sg32a1). R33 no new linter.
patterns.nilguard_fp: ctx-propagation linters (execcommandwithoutcontext confirmed; ctxbackground at-risk) FP on intentional `if ctx!=nil{CtxVariant}else{Plain}` / `cmp.Or(ctx, context.Background())` dual-path. Codebase uses this idiom heavily (github_cli.go RunGH/RunGHContext, actionpins.go:355 cmp.Or fallback). Autofix into nil-path panics.
patterns.ci_enforce: cgo.yml:1122 POSITIVE LINTER_FLAGS, R33=12 flags (unchanged). Append flag for zero-vio linter; convert-to-zero or //nolint first for non-zero.
patterns.cross_bot_dedup: Other bots file overlapping issues (lint-monster #38012/#38014 sort.Slice migration). gh api search/issues -f q= returns {null} sometimes; use `gh api repos/.../issues?labels=sergo&state=all --jq`. Sergo scoped doc-sync+precision+near-zero-enforce (orthogonal to migration).
patterns.team_closes_fast: REVISED: SIMPLE sergo issues -> PRs+CLOSED within ~1-2 days; open_issues usually empty. BUT complex/blocked ones linger (sg32a1/a2 open 1+ day). gh api issues?labels=sergo&state=all confirms landings.

linters_R33.enforced_12: errstringmatch panicinlibrarycode manualmutexunlock osexitinlibrary rawloginlib regexpcompileinfunction fprintlnsprintf strconvparseignorederror jsonmarshalignoredeerror uncheckedtypeassertion fmterrorfnoverbs tolowerequalfold
linters_R33.unenforced_12: contextcancelnotdeferred ctxbackground(~30 sites, precision sg33a1 pending) errormessage(opt-in) excessivefuncparams execcommandwithoutcontext(sg32a1/a2 open) fileclosenotdeferred largefunc ossetenvlibrary ssljson seenmapbool(dismissed) lenstringzero sortslice(migration-owned)
linters_R33.next_candidates: R34: (1) reverify sg33a1 ctxbackground precision + sg33a2 shared helper landed; (2) reverify sg32a1 #38281 + sg32a2 #38282 (long-open execcommand) — if still open after several days, consider report on land-rate or noop; (3) watch for 25th linter (doc_lag expect 0 + precision_audit); (4) if sg33a2 lands as IsPkgCall, no follow-up; if rejected, drop syntactic_stdlib_match for enforced linters (team accepts syntactic for zero-vio). Avoid complex control-flow fixes (slow to land per revised precision_fix_lands).

repo_context: pkg/: ~904 prod .go, ~1265 test .go. 24 analyzer subpkgs + internal/astutil (IsFmtErrorf package-aware helper, IsLocalObject, RhsExprForIndex, NodeText, Inspector). ~36 context.Background() prod sites/~10 files. bash_policy + tool gotchas live in sergo-tools-list.json.
